artifacts.summary: Deep analysis of is_modally_saturated semantics, verification of singleton bundle failure, and multi-family BFMCS path forward

research_findings.blocker_cause: Singleton bundle conflates modal accessibility with identity - Diamond(psi) does NOT imply psi in same MCS
research_findings.recommended_path: Multi-family BFMCS bundle with distinct mcs functions where witness families place witness MCSes at appropriate times
